message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title RqP – Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as RqP
package "Client Application (CA)\n«Custom Application»" as CA {
    box "User Interface" as UI
}
package "Resource Server (RS)\n«Custom Application»" as RS {
    box "REST API" as REST_API
    database "Resource" as ResourceDB
    database "Credential" as CredentialDB
}
package "Authorization Server (AS)\nForgeRock Access Manager" as AS {
    box "AM API" as AM_API
    box "UMA API" as UMA_API
    box "OAuth API" as OAuth_API
}
package "Content Server (CS)\n«Custom Application»" as CS {
    box "REST API" as CS_REST_API
    database "Data" as DataDB
}

RqP -> AM_API: Authenticate
activate AM_API
AM_API --> RqP: Authenticated
deactivate AM_API

RqP -> UI: Access Interface
activate UI
UI -> UI: Obtain Resource Id\n(maybe from Discover Resources)
UI -> REST_API: GET /share/resources/{resourceId}\nscopes (no valid RPT)
activate REST_API
REST_API -> ResourceDB: Get_id
activate ResourceDB
ResourceDB --> REST_API: meta data
deactivate ResourceDB
REST_API -> CredentialDB: Get PAT
activate CredentialDB
CredentialDB --> REST_API: PAT
deactivate CredentialDB
deactivate REST_API

note right of UI: Get permission ticket for the\nresource and scope
REST_API -> UMA_API: POST /am/uma/permission_request\nresource_id + scopes
activate UMA_API
UMA_API --> REST_API: permission ticket
deactivate UMA_API
REST_API --> UI: permission ticket + AS URI
deactivate UI

UI -> UI: Get client auth basic
note left of UI: Get claim token for the\nRequesting Party (RqP)
UI -> OAuth_API: POST /am/oauth2/access_token\nscope=openid\nSSO session
activate OAuth_API
OAuth_API -> OAuth_API: Validate SSO session
OAuth_API --> UI: claim token
deactivate OAuth_API

note left of UI: Get Requesting Party Token (RPT)\nusing the permission ticket\nand claim token
UI -> OAuth_API: POST /am/oauth2/access_token\ngrant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:uma-ticket\nscope=..., ticket=..., claim_token=..., claim_token_format=...
activate OAuth_API
OAuth_API -> AM_API: Check Access
activate AM_API
AM_API -> AM_API: No Policy for RqP + Resource + scopes\nCreate Access Request for Resource Owner
AM_API --> OAuth_API: No Access, request Submitted
deactivate AM_API
deactivate OAuth_API
OAuth_API --> UI: Error: Request Submitted
deactivate UI
UI --> RqP

@enduml
```
